name: laabu-kiq-enterprise-search
description: Enterprise knowledge search and retrieval across all organisational data sources: RAG corpus, Gmail, Google Drive, Jira, Confluence, GitHub, SharePoint, OneDrive, Outlook, and Notion. Surfaces answers grounded in company data with source citations.

skills.name: Knowledge Base Search
skills.description: Semantic search across organisation-uploaded documents in the RAG corpus. Returns ranked excerpts with source file, relevance score, and direct citations.
skills.input: Natural language question or keyword query
skills.output: Ranked document chunks with source, text excerpt, and relevance score
examples: Find our refund policy
Search for the Q3 product roadmap
What does our onboarding guide say about leave entitlements?

skills.name: Gmail Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve emails from the connected Google Workspace Gmail account by sender, subject, date range, or keywords.
skills.output: Matching email threads with subject, sender, date, and body excerpt
examples: Find emails from alice@acme.com this week
Show unread emails about the product launch
What did Maya send about the contract renewal?

skills.name: Google Drive Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve documents, spreadsheets, and presentations from Google Drive.
skills.input: Natural language file query or keyword
skills.output: Matching files with name, type, owner, last modified date, and content excerpt
examples: Find the sales deck from last quarter
Get the content of the pricing spreadsheet
Search Drive for the engineering onboarding checklist

skills.name: Jira Issue Search
skills.description: Query Jira issues using JQL or natural language across all connected Jira projects.
skills.input: JQL string or natural language description of issues to find
skills.output: Matching issues with key, summary, status, assignee, and priority
examples: Find open bugs assigned to the platform team
Show all Jira tickets in progress for project KIQ
Get the details of ticket KIQ-142

skills.name: GitHub Code & PR Search
skills.description: Search repositories, commits, pull requests, and issues in the connected GitHub organisation.
skills.input: Natural language query about code, commits, or pull requests
skills.output: Matching repositories, commits, PRs, or issues with metadata
examples: List open pull requests in the stratova-gcp repo
Find recent commits mentioning session service
What issues are open in the admin-iq repository?

skills.name: Confluence Page Search
skills.description: Search pages and spaces in the connected Atlassian Confluence instance using CQL or natural language.
skills.input: Natural language query or CQL expression
skills.output: Matching pages with title, space, last updated date, and content excerpt
examples: Find the engineering architecture decision records
Search Confluence for the incident response runbook
Get the content of the API design guidelines page

skills.name: SharePoint Document Search
skills.description: Search documents and files in connected Microsoft SharePoint sites.
skills.output: Matching SharePoint documents with name, site, path, and modified date
examples: Find the HR policy documents on SharePoint
Search SharePoint for vendor contract templates
Get the latest compliance checklist from SharePoint

skills.name: OneDrive File Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve files stored in Microsoft OneDrive for the connected account.
skills.output: Matching files with name, type, and text content
examples: Find the Q4 budget spreadsheet in OneDrive
List all files in my OneDrive root folder
Get the content of the project proposal document

skills.name: Outlook Mail Search
skills.description: Search and retrieve emails from the connected Microsoft Outlook account.
skills.input: Natural language email query (sender, subject, date, keywords)
skills.output: Matching emails with subject, sender, date, and full body text
examples: Find emails from riya@stratova.ai about contract renewals
Show unread emails in my inbox from this week
Search for emails with attachments about the product launch

skills.name: Notion Workspace Search
skills.description: Search pages and query databases in the connected Notion workspace.
skills.input: Natural language query or database filter
skills.output: Matching pages with full text content, or database records with field values
examples: Search Notion for our product roadmap
List all databases in our Notion workspace
Query the CRM database filtered by Status = Active

skills.name: Gemini Enterprise Connectors
skills.description: Search across all Gemini Enterprise connected data sources using the Gemini Connector API for a unified enterprise knowledge experience.
skills.output: Ranked results from all connected enterprise sources
examples: What was discussed about Acme Corp across all sources?
Find everything related to the Q4 planning cycle
Summarise all activity for deal HS-1234
